aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Impatient momentum

💼 Career: Jaldi result chahoge, par process stretch hoga

❤️ Love: छोटी बात pe irritation aa sakta hai

💰 Money: Rash decision नुकसान दे सकता है

🧘 Advice: Pace control karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jaldi ke chakkar me galti kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded stability

💼 Career: Consistent effort ka visible progress milega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust deepen hoga

💰 Money: Steady growth signal

🧘 Advice: Routine ko maintain rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara strength consistency hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Overthinking loop

💼 Career: Too many ideas execution slow karenge

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum clarity ko complicate kar dete ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer
